top.thesis: Arbutus Biopharma Corp (ABUS) screens constructively, with 8 independent categories pointing favourably — led by financial health, competitive position, momentum. The weighted composite score is 74/100, and 8 of the scored categories agree on the bullish side versus 0 on the bearish side — conviction here rests on that breadth of agreement, not on any single category. This is a research/screening read of independent evidence, not a prediction or investment advice.

top.fundamental_summary: Category scores — growth 72/100, business quality 49/100, financial health 100/100. Most recent period (Q1 2026): revenue $179.1M, net income $169.7M, free cash flow $-8.1M, operating margin 94.4%.
top.technical_summary: Category scores — price technicals 76/100 (confidence 100%), momentum 90/100 (confidence 80%). Latest close 5.22 on 2026-07-08; the available 501-bar window ranged 2.71–5.34. The last close sits at the 95% point of that range (0% = window low, 100% = window high).
top.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 8 agree on the bullish side (8 bullish, 0 bearish); signal-agreement is 68% and overall conviction confidence is 64%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 79% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: filling the thin-coverage categories (ownership / insider activity); raising confidence in ownership / insider activity; more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs Q1 2026: revenue $179.1M, net income $169.7M).
Operating-margin trend: watch whether it holds above the latest 94.4%; sustained compression would weaken the quality and value reads.
Insider activity: latest disclosed transaction was a award by Nguyen Tuan on 2026-02-02; watch for further open-market buys (supportive) or cluster selling (a warning).
Breakout level: a sustained close above 5.34 (the 501-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 5.22.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 2.71 (the 501-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.
Catalyst follow-through: track resolution of 'Catalyst: regulatory approval: 0.22' and whether it plays out as the evidence suggests.

top.confidence_explanation: Of 11 scored non-risk categories, 6 agree on the bullish side (6 bullish, 0 bearish); signal-agreement is 65% and overall conviction confidence is 62%. Conviction is intentionally driven by how many INDEPENDENT categories agree, not by any single extreme score. Mean data coverage across categories is 83% — the fraction of required inputs that were actually present; missing data lowers, never inflates, the score. Confidence would RISE if: filling the thin-coverage categories (ownership / insider activity); raising confidence in ownership / insider activity; more independent categories moving into agreement. Confidence would FALL if: categories began to disagree, fresh data warnings appeared, or already-strong categories weakened toward neutral.
monitoring_checklist: Next earnings report: confirm revenue and earnings do not deteriorate (vs Q2 2026: revenue $178.4M, net income $16.2M).
Operating-margin trend: watch whether it holds above the latest 12.1%; sustained compression would weaken the quality and value reads.
Insider activity: latest disclosed transaction was a other:F by Tengwall Kyle on 2026-06-15; watch for further open-market buys (supportive) or cluster selling (a warning).
Breakout level: a sustained close above 17.56 (the 501-bar window high) would confirm upside technicals; last close was 15.51.
Breakdown level: a sustained close below 7.73 (the 501-bar window low) would invalidate the technical read and warrant reassessment.
Catalyst follow-through: track resolution of 'Catalyst: earnings beat: 0.24' and whether it plays out as the evidence suggests.
